query:
-- Check his join session for membership details
SELECT id, email, step, userId, membershipTier, membershipType, signerName, joiningFeePaidAt, createdAt
FROM join_sessions
WHERE userId = 9690367 OR email = 'abusufyan511308@gmail.com'
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;

-- Also check gc_mandates for him
SELECT id, userId, billingRequestId, mandateId, status, joiningFeePaidAt
FROM gc_mandates
WHERE userId = 9690367;
